form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr5) over 1635m after being wide early at Temora was 8th-14.4 at the bell, beaten 15 m by Oak Ridge (2:00.30) in NR 42 to 48 on April 6 at $34. Before that, 5th (Fr2) over 1710m at Goulburn beaten 25 m by Rudimentary (2:04.00) in NR up to 47 on March 30 at $51. Capable of going a lot better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr5) over 1635m after being wide early at Temora was 8th-14.4 at the bell, beaten 15 m by Oak Ridge (2:00.30) in NR 42 to 48 on April 6 at $34. Before that, 5th (Fr2) over 1710m at Goulburn beaten 25 m by Rudimentary (2:04.00) in NR up to 47 on March 30 at $51. Capable of going a lot better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung out throughout the early stages of the race.
Inside the final 200m momentarily locked wheels with Sports Liner.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr6) over 1730m after showing early pace at Bathurst, at the bell was 3rd-3.73 beaten 5 m by Layla Shannon (2:05.30) in NR up to 52 M on April 1 at $1.45. Before that, a good run when 2nd (Fr5) over 2125m after showing early speed and racing wide at Penrith, at the bell was 2nd-1.09 beaten 7 m by Miss Blue Stork (2:35.90) in NR up to 48 on March 26 at $1.75. Take beating from this draw.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 5th (Fr6) over 1730m after showing early pace at Bathurst, at the bell was 3rd-3.73 beaten 5 m by Layla Shannon (2:05.30) in NR up to 52 M on April 1 at $1.45. Before that, a good run when 2nd (Fr5) over 2125m after showing early speed and racing wide at Penrith, at the bell was 2nd-1.09 beaten 7 m by Miss Blue Stork (2:35.90) in NR up to 48 on March 26 at $1.75. Take beating from this draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and broke gait near the 1400m when Maggie Moth broke gait.
Broke gait during the score up and a false start was declared.

form.formComment: Last start broke in score up and was out of position at the start 4th (Fr4) over 1740m at Riverina Paceway, beaten 16 m by Feelgood Ray (2:04.90) in NR up to 47 on April 4 at $5. Before that, was well back in the run when 6th (Fr5) over 1710m at Goulburn, at the bell was 6th-10.1 beaten 10 m by Majors Creek (2:04.80) in NR up to 50 M on March 30 at $5.50. Expecting a much better run this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start broke in score up and was out of position at the start 4th (Fr4) over 1740m at Riverina Paceway, beaten 16 m by Feelgood Ray (2:04.90) in NR up to 47 on April 4 at $5. Before that, was well back in the run when 6th (Fr5) over 1710m at Goulburn, at the bell was 6th-10.1 beaten 10 m by Majors Creek (2:04.80) in NR up to 50 M on March 30 at $5.50. Expecting a much better run this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in rounding the home turn on the final occasion and raced roughly.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 8th (Sr4) over 1635m at Temora was 9th-19.9 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Modern Sheen (2:) in NR up to 47 M on April 6 at $10. Showed ability the run before when she raced just off the speed and boxed on; posted a big 3 m win after showing early speed, (Fr3) at Goulburn (2:04.80) beating Eyedidntloseit in NR up to 50 M on March 30 at $6.50 at the bell was 3rd-3.9. In the mix on the form from two back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Failed to impress last start; 8th (Sr4) over 1635m at Temora was 9th-19.9 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Modern Sheen (2:) in NR up to 47 M on April 6 at $10. Showed ability the run before when she raced just off the speed and boxed on; posted a big 3 m win after showing early speed, (Fr3) at Goulburn (2:04.80) beating Eyedidntloseit in NR up to 50 M on March 30 at $6.50 at the bell was 3rd-3.9. In the mix on the form from two back.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced three wide early before restraining to obtain cover.
Held up and unable to obtain clear running.
Tightened racing towards the first turn.
Inclined to hang in when placed under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: Last start by 1.0 m when quickly away, (Fr4) at Temora (2:00.30) beating Hes A Terror in NR 42 to 48 on April 6 at $5.50 at the bell was leading 3.7. In form now and can go on with it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start by 1.0 m when quickly away, (Fr4) at Temora (2:00.30) beating Hes A Terror in NR 42 to 48 on April 6 at $5.50 at the bell was leading 3.7. In form now and can go on with it.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke stride in the latter stages of the score up causing a false start.
Held up for clear running in the home straight.
Approaching the 600m shifted out momentarily inconveniencing Pad Thai.
Held up for clear running over the concluding stages of the race.
Hung out shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Sr1) over 1635m at Temora was 4th-7.7 at the bell, beaten 10 m by Modern Sheen (2:) in NR up to 47 M on April 6 at $9. At the start before good run when 3rd (Fr2) over 1710m after showing early speed at Goulburn was 5th-8.4 at the bell, beaten 9 m by Majors Creek (2:04.80) in NR up to 50 M on March 30 at $14. Place best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 5th (Sr1) over 1635m at Temora was 4th-7.7 at the bell, beaten 10 m by Modern Sheen (2:) in NR up to 47 M on April 6 at $9. At the start before good run when 3rd (Fr2) over 1710m after showing early speed at Goulburn was 5th-8.4 at the bell, beaten 9 m by Majors Creek (2:04.80) in NR up to 50 M on March 30 at $14. Place best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running until near the 100m.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Sr3) over 1635m at Temora was 2nd-3.7 at the bell, beaten 10 m by Oak Ridge (2:00.30) in NR 42 to 48 on April 6 at $2.60. At his previous start solid effort when 3rd (Sr4) over 1760m after racing wide at Junee, at the bell was 2nd-1.2 beaten 3.5 m by Sokys Falcon (2:10.80) in NR 40 to 48 on March 31 at $13. Can do much better this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 4th (Sr3) over 1635m at Temora was 2nd-3.7 at the bell, beaten 10 m by Oak Ridge (2:00.30) in NR 42 to 48 on April 6 at $2.60. At his previous start solid effort when 3rd (Sr4) over 1760m after racing wide at Junee, at the bell was 2nd-1.2 beaten 3.5 m by Sokys Falcon (2:10.80) in NR 40 to 48 on March 31 at $13. Can do much better this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced shortly after the start when Magic Matteo broke stride.
Caught wide early before working forward to lead at approximately 1100m.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr2) over 1760m at Junee, at the bell was 6th-11 beaten 16 m by Sokys Falcon (2:10.80) in NR 40 to 48 on March 31 at $4.40. At the start before 4th (Sr3) over 1720m at Young was 6th-15.9 at the bell, beaten 5 m by Excuse To Cullect (2:04.70) in NR 45 to 47 on March 24 at $34. Winning claims on best efforts.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 8th (Fr2) over 1760m at Junee, at the bell was 6th-11 beaten 16 m by Sokys Falcon (2:10.80) in NR 40 to 48 on March 31 at $4.40. At the start before 4th (Sr3) over 1720m at Young was 6th-15.9 at the bell, beaten 5 m by Excuse To Cullect (2:04.70) in NR 45 to 47 on March 24 at $34. Winning claims on best efforts.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Sr2) over 1635m at Temora was 8th-13.4 at the bell, beaten 14 m by Letstacoboutit (2:01.50) in NR 39 to 41 on April 6 at $34. Two runs back raced just off the speed and boxed on; won by 4 m (Sr4) at Young (2:07.60) beating Good Chat in NR up to 37 on March 24 at $6.50 at the bell was 2nd-1.8. This looks a far sterner task.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 8th (Sr2) over 1635m at Temora was 8th-13.4 at the bell, beaten 14 m by Letstacoboutit (2:01.50) in NR 39 to 41 on April 6 at $34. Two runs back raced just off the speed and boxed on; won by 4 m (Sr4) at Young (2:07.60) beating Good Chat in NR up to 37 on March 24 at $6.50 at the bell was 2nd-1.8. This looks a far sterner task.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Momentarily locked wheels with Calm Franco, near the finish line.

form.formComment: Resumes today. At the latest first-up run broke in score up and was out of position at the start 10th (Sr1) over 1770m at this track well beaten by Camanchi Warrior (2:09.00) in NR up to 53 on October 13 at $23. Might need this run and others rate better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resumes today. At the latest first-up run broke in score up and was out of position at the start 10th (Sr1) over 1770m at this track well beaten by Camanchi Warrior (2:09.00) in NR up to 53 on October 13 at $23. Might need this run and others rate better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke during the score out of position at the start.
Over raced during the middle stages.
Worked forward to obtain the lead passing the 1700m.
